workflow_name: Neptune Controls - Director's Email Command Center

nodes.label: Email Triage Agent
nodes.description: Fetches recent emails from both Gmail and Outlook, categorizes them (Urgent, Team Updates, External, FYI), and flags priority messages requiring Director action.

nodes.label: Response Drafter Agent
nodes.description: Analyzes a selected email's context and generates a professional draft response template appropriate for the Director's tone and common query patterns.
nodes.trigger: Draft Response button on Email Detail

nodes.label: Follow-up Scheduler Agent
nodes.description: Creates a follow-up reminder as a Google Calendar event for a selected email, with appropriate timing and context notes.
nodes.trigger: Schedule Follow-up button on Email Detail

nodes.label: Team Action Tracker Agent
nodes.description: Conversational agent that helps the Director log new action items for team members, update statuses, query pending tasks, and summarize team accountability through natural language using Notion.
nodes.trigger: Chat input on Team Actions tab
